title: Love Reminder
prompt: Express your feelings about love using the phrase 'Don't forget I gave much of my love.'
hint: Use the phrase to remind someone about your love.
sample: Don't forget I gave much of my love to you.
ja: 내가 많은 사랑을 줬다는 것을 잊지 마세요.
local: 내가 많은 사랑을 줬다는 것을 잊지 마세요.
local_pron: naega manheun sarangeul jwotdaneun geoseul itji maseyo
ko: 내가 많은 사랑을 줬다는 것을 잊지 마세요.
ko_pron: naega manheun sarangeul jwotdaneun geoseul itji maseyo

title: Think of It
prompt: Use the phrase 'Think of it' to encourage someone to remember something important.
hint: Repeat the phrase to emphasize the importance.
sample: Think of it carefully before you decide.

title: Love
prompt: Use the word 'Love' in a sentence to express affection.
hint: Repeat the word to show emphasis.
sample: Love is the most important thing in life.

title: You
prompt: Use the word 'You' to address someone directly.
hint: Use it to make your message personal.
sample: You are always in my heart.
